grant_title: Arts Grants for Nonprofits in New Haven, Connecticut
demographic_requirements: Nonprofit organizations with a focus on arts-related projects in New Haven, Connecticut
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations in New Haven, Connecticut seeking funding for arts-related projects and programs. Eligible applicants must be registered 501(c)(3) organizations or equivalent, with a focus on arts access, participation, creative writing, dance, journalism, museums, music, performing arts, theater, or visual arts.
